report.summary: Cycle 6 standup (Mar 28 late night). BTC $66,008 (−$238 from v5, $66K support holding). ETH ~$1,977 (sub-$2K day 3+). F&G 12 (Extreme Fear, 48+ day streak — longest since FTX). DELTA: Uncommitted files 309→320 (+11). build-4 shipped Smart Contract Audit Guide (789 lines) + DA Layer Comparison (511 lines), both added to PUBLISHED_PAGES (585 total, +3). design-v5 fixed 5 schema/structured-data bugs + 2 OG images. community-v6 drafted tweets #220-222 + Newsletter v37 + Morgan Stanley MSBT social card. Deploy blocked 16th consecutive cycle. 27 total agent runs today.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: $66,008 (−$238 from last cycle's $66,246). $66K support still holding but tested. Down 24.6% YTD, 48% from Oct 2025 ATH ($126K). BTC dominance ~56%. Iran/geopolitical tensions + oil >$100 remain primary headwinds. $14B quarterly options expiry just cleared — positioning volatility expected.

ETH: ~$1,977 (−$8 from $1,985). Sub-$2K now persistent for 3+ days. ETH/BTC ~0.030 (multi-year low). $253M mystery whale accumulation since Mar 1 continues. Polymarket showing split odds on ETH direction.

F&G INDEX: 12 (Extreme Fear). 48+ consecutive days — longest streak since post-FTX (Nov 2022). Volume contracted 18% to $95.99B (below 30-day avg $108B). Total market cap ~$2.37T. Historically, readings this low correlate with major accumulation zones.

CATALYSTS SINCE LAST CYCLE: Morgan Stanley MSBT filing — first bank-issued spot BTC ETF at 0.14% fee (lowest US). SEC + CFTC digital commodities ruling: 16 major cryptos (incl ETH, SOL) classified as commodities, staking declared administrative activity. Franklin Templeton $1.7T → Ondo Finance 24/7 trading. All bullish institutional signals despite extreme fear.

DELTA FROM CYCLE 5 (standup-v5): BTC $66,246→$66,008 (−0.4%). ETH $1,985→$1,977 (−0.4%). F&G flat at 12. Uncommitted files 309→320 (+11). Published pages 582→585 (+3). 2 new learn guides built + 5 schema bugs fixed + 2 OG images + Newsletter v37. No new commits. No new deploys.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE 6 OF MARCH 28. Five full rotations (all 6 agents) completed + partial cycle 6. 26 agent runs prior to this standup + this standup = 27 total today. Breakdown: standup×6, build×4, publish×2, design×5, community×5, eod×5.

WHAT SHIPPED SINCE CYCLE 5: build-4 created 2 new learn guides — Smart Contract Security Audit Guide 2026 (789 lines, ~3200 words, OWASP Top 10, firm comparison table, cost analysis, 6 FAQs) and Celestia vs EigenDA vs Avail DA Comparison 2026 (511 lines, ~3000 words, 7-dimension comparison table, selection framework, 6 FAQs). Both added directly to PUBLISHED_PAGES (585 total, +3 since v5). design-v5 fixed 5 bugs (StructuredData prop, schema param names, author field type, missing author/url in smart contract page) + created 2 OG SVG images. community-v6 drafted tweets #220-222 (Morgan Stanley MSBT, SEC commodity ruling, weekend accumulation signal) + Newsletter v37 Weekly Digest + Morgan Stanley MSBT social card SVG.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS (CRITICAL): (1) Deploy — 320 uncommitted files (+11 from cycle 5), 16th cycle flagging P0. HEAD still at 21aaf5b (Mar 25). (2) 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items still blocked (wallet security slug mismatch + restaking no page.tsx). (3) 105 legacy published slugs missing page.tsx (~82% coverage at 480/585). (4) 145 TS errors in 6 files (stable, non-blocking JSX syntax). (5) 0/6 API routes rate-limited.
GIT STATUS: HEAD at 21aaf5b (unchanged since Mar 25). 320 files pending (31 modified + 289 untracked). All changes additive — zero destructive modifications.

PUBLISHED PAGES: 585 live (+3: smart contract audit, DA comparison, +1 other). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (both blocked: wallet security + restaking). Content velocity today: 12 pages built across 4 build cycles. 222 tweets drafted cumulative. 37 newsletter versions. 16+ OG images created today.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [CRITICAL, 16TH CONSECUTIVE CYCLE]: 320 uncommitted files spanning 3+ days. Every learn guide, OG image, UX fix, schema correction, and metadata change is invisible to production. Google cannot index any of the 12 pages built today. Morgan Stanley MSBT + SEC commodity ruling content is time-sensitive — delays mean lost news-cycle traffic. Jefe: one git commit + push unlocks everything. 5-minute action, highest possible leverage.

PRIORITY 2 — CAPITALIZE ON INSTITUTIONAL NEWS CYCLE: Morgan Stanley MSBT (first bank-issued BTC ETF) and SEC/CFTC digital commodities ruling are breaking news. We have the content (Crypto ETFs guide, Regulations 2026 page) but it's stuck behind the deploy blocker. If deployed, these pages would capture significant search traffic from users researching these developments. Time-sensitive: news cycle window is 48-72hrs.

PRIORITY 3 — FIX 2 BLOCKED QUEUE ITEMS + RATE LIMITER: wallet-security slug mismatch and restaking missing page.tsx have been blocked for 16+ cycles. Quick scaffold fixes unlock 2 more indexable pages. Also: 0/6 API routes have rate limiting — one bad actor could spike CoinGecko/DefiLlama API costs. Low effort, high defensive value.
